title: cerastium umbellatum
intro: Cerastium umbellatum, also known as the frost flower or snow-in-summer, is a low-growing, spreading perennial herb with white or pink flowers. The plant has been used in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Cerastium umbellatum include its potential to soothe wounds, reduce inflammation, and alleviate respiratory issues. The herbal preparations of this plant can be found in teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often used to treat colds, sore throats, and other respiratory ailments.
